'''√v-z-r''' ('''kavazar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:culch|culch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:culch|culch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| kavazar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thivazar || jivazar || shivazar || kivazar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuvazar || jujuvazar || shushuvazar || kukuvazar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuvazar || juvazar || shuvazar || kuvazar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuvazar || juvazar || shuvazar || kuvazar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thevazar || jevazar || shevazar || kevazar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothovazar || jojovazar || shoshovazar || kokovazar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thovazar || jovazar || shovazar || kovazar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thovazar || jovazar || shovazar || kovazar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vazar || vazar || vazar || vazar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vazar || vazar || vazar || vazar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vazar || vazar || vazar || vazar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vazar || vazar || vazar || vazar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thævazar || jævazar || shævazar || kævazar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathavazar || jajavazar || shashavazar || kakavazar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thavazar || javazar || shavazar || kavazar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thavazar || javazar || shavazar || kavazar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shavazar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshavazar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishavazar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shavazarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshavazarnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishavazarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shavazarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshavazarnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishavazarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shavazarro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshavazarnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishavazarro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shavazarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshavazarnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishavazarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shavazarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshavazarnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishavazarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shavazarng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshavazarnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishavazarng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shavazarya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshavazarnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishavazarya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shavazaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshavazarnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishavazaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shavazarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshavazarnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishavazarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shavazarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavazarnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavazarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shavazarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshavazarnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavazarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shavazarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshavazarnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishavazarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shavazarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavazarnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavazarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shavazarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshavazarnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavazarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shavazarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshavazarnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishavazarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shavazarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshavazarnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishavazarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shavazarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshavazarnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavazarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shavazarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshavazarnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishavazarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shavazarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshavazarnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishavazarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shavazarmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavazarnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavazarmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
